HGSS.535.0000:
Professor Elm: Hi, [0103,0000,0000]!
I’ve been waiting for you!\f
Do you know anything about
my research?\f
As you know, Pokémon are carried
in Poké Balls these days.\f
But before the Poké Ball was invented,
people used to walk with Pokémon.\r
Just like your friend Lyra does!\f
Poké Balls are great because you can
carry many Pokémon.\f
But walking with Pokémon must have
some advantages.\f
It could have something to do with how
Pokémon grow or evolve...\f
So I’m going to give you a Pokémon!\f
Can you walk beside this Pokémon,
outside of its Poké Ball, to see if this\r
brings any special feelings or bonds\r
between Pokémon and people?\f
The device over there has some Pokémon
you could choose from...\f
HGSS.535.0001:
Professor Elm: Hi, [0103,0000,0000]!
I’ve been waiting for you!\f
Do you know anything about
my research?\f
As you know, Pokémon are carried
in Poké Balls these days.\f
But before the Poké Ball was invented,
people used to walk with Pokémon.\r
Just like your friend Ethan does!\f
Poké Balls are great because you can
carry many Pokémon.\f
But walking with Pokémon must have
some advantages.\f
It could have something to do with how
Pokémon grow or evolve...\f
So I’m going to give you a Pokémon!\f
Can you walk beside this Pokémon,
outside of its Poké Ball, to see if this\r
brings any special feelings or bonds\r
between Pokémon and people?\f
The device over there has some Pokémon
you could choose from...\f
HGSS.535.0002: Professor Elm: Oh, hey! I got an email!\f
HGSS.535.0004:
Professor Elm: Hey, listen.
I have this acquaintance that people\r
call Mr. Pokémon.\f
He keeps finding weird things and
raving about his discoveries.\f
Anyway, I just got an email from him
saying that this time it’s real.\f
It’s probably another Pokémon Egg,
but we’re still so busy with our\r
Pokémon research...\f
Wait!
I know!\f
You can go in our place, right?
Can we count on you?\f
You can choose one of the Pokémon
over there.\f
HGSS.535.0005:
Professor Elm: If a wild Pokémon
appears, let your Pokémon battle it!
HGSS.535.0006:
Professor Elm: Where are you going?
The Poké Balls are in that device.\f
HGSS.535.0008:
Give a nickname to the [0100,0001,0000]
you received? [0200,0000]
HGSS.535.0009:
Is [0101,0001,0000] the nickname
you want to give? [0200,0000]
HGSS.535.0010:
Professor Elm: How do you like walking
with your Pokémon? It’s not bad, is it?\f
You can take it all the way to
Mr. Pokémon’s house.\f
If your Pokémon gets hurt...\f
HGSS.535.0011:
You should heal it with this machine.\f
It’s so easy to use.
Just check the PC on my desk!\f
HGSS.535.0012:
Professor Elm: Mr. Pokémon goes
everywhere and finds rarities.\r
His house is past Cherrygrove City.\f
Go north a little past Cherrygrove.\r
I’m counting on you, [0103,0000,0000]!
HGSS.535.0013:
Professor Elm: Mr. Pokémon goes
everywhere and finds rarities.\r
His house is past Cherrygrove City.\f
Go north a little past Cherrygrove.\r
I’m counting on you, [0103,0000,0000]!
HGSS.535.0014:
This PC is connected to the
healing machine!
HGSS.535.0015:
There are two valuable Pokémon left!
...But they belong to Professor Elm.
HGSS.535.0016:
There is one valuable Pokémon left!
You didn’t notice before, but it is\r
behind thick glass walls now so\r
nothing bad can happen to it!
HGSS.535.0017:
There are no valuable Pokémon left...\f
You wonder who Professor Elm gave the
last Pokémon to?
HGSS.535.0018:
Huh? Me?
I’m not the professor.\f
He’s at the back of the room.
HGSS.535.0019:
[0103,0000,0000], I want you to have these
to help you with your task.\f
HGSS.535.0020:
[0103,0000,0000], I want you to have these
to help you with your task.\f
HGSS.535.0021:
Pokémon are weak in the beginning.\f
Don’t hesitate to use a Potion if you
think yours is in danger.\f
HGSS.535.0022:
Pokémon are weak in the beginning.\f
Don’t hesitate to use a Potion if you
think yours is in danger.
HGSS.535.0023:
Who are you?
We are investigating the case of the\r
missing Pokémon here...\f
Rule number one!
“Whoever did it will come\r
back to the site.”\f
Oh my... So you must be...
the one who did it?\f
HGSS.535.0024:
Lyra: Hold on a second!
He has nothing to do with it!\f
I saw it.
There was a red-haired boy\r
looking into the building!\f
HGSS.535.0025:
Ethan: Hold on a second!
She has nothing to do with it!\f
I saw it.
There was a red-haired boy\r
looking into the building!\f
HGSS.535.0026:
What?
You battled a boy like that?\f
He must be the one who did it...
Did you happen to get his name?\f
HGSS.535.0028:
Thanks for helping my investigation!\f
My next assignment is to search for
this red-haired individual.\f
HGSS.535.0029:
That’s not it?\f
Then can you tell me
what the name was?\f
HGSS.535.0030:
Lyra: [0103,0000,0000]!
I’m glad they understand you are\r
innocent.\f
See you later!\f
HGSS.535.0031:
Ethan: [0103,0000,0000]!
I’m glad they understand you are\r
innocent.\f
See you later!\f
HGSS.535.0032:
Professor Elm: [0103,0000,0000], this
is terrible...\f
Oh, yes, what was Mr. Pokémon’s
big discovery?\f
HGSS.535.0033:
Professor Elm: [0103,0000,0000], this
is terrible...\f
Oh, yes, what was Mr. Pokémon’s
big discovery?\f
HGSS.535.0034:
[0103,0000,0000] handed the Mystery Egg
to Professor Elm.
HGSS.535.0035:
Professor Elm: Huh?
This is an...Egg, isn’t it?\f
This Egg may be something I’ve never
seen...still it’s just an Egg.\f
Mr. Pokémon is always fascinated
by Eggs.\f
Well, since he gave it to us, we might
as well find out what secret it holds.\f
I’ll keep it for a while to find out
about the Egg.\f
HGSS.535.0036:
Professor Elm: What?!\f
Professor Oak gave you a Pokédex?\f
[0103,0000,0000], is that true? Th-that’s
incredible!\f
He is superb at seeing the potential
of people as Trainers.\f
Wow, [0103,0000,0000].
I knew you were a little different.\r
Things are going to be fun!\f
Your Pokémon seem to really like you,
so why don’t you...take the\r
Pokémon Gym challenge?\f
If you manage to defeat all the
Gym Leaders, you’ll eventually\r
challenge the Pokémon League\r
Champion!\f
...Or not! Ha ha!\f
Becoming the Champion is not at all
easy, but you can certainly\r
challenge Violet City’s Gym.\f
HGSS.535.0037:
Professor Elm: What?!\f
Professor Oak gave you a Pokédex?\f
[0103,0000,0000], is that true? Th-that’s
incredible!\f
He is superb at seeing the potential
of people as Trainers.\f
Wow, [0103,0000,0000].
I knew you were a little different.\r
Things are going to be fun!\f

so why don’t you...take the\r

challenge the Pokémon League\r
Champion!\f
...Or not! Ha ha!\f
Becoming the Champion is not at all
easy, but you can certainly\r
challenge Violet City’s Gym.\f
HGSS.535.0038:
...[0103,0000,0000]. Challenging the
Gyms scattered around will be\r
a long journey.\f
Before you leave, make sure
that you talk to your mom.\f
HGSS.535.0039:
...[0103,0000,0000]. Challenging the
Gyms scattered around will be\r
a long journey.\f
Before you leave, make sure
that you talk to your mom.\f
HGSS.535.0040:
Professor Elm: Don’t give up! I’ll call
if I learn anything about that Egg!
HGSS.535.0041:
There was a loud noise outside...
When we went to look, someone\r
stole a Pokémon.\f
Sigh... 
That stolen Pokémon.\f
I wonder how it’s doing.
They say a Pokémon raised by a bad\r
person turns bad itself.
HGSS.535.0042:
Professor Elm: [0103,0000,0000]?
Didn’t you meet my assistant?\f
He should have met you with the Egg
at Violet City’s Poké Mart.
HGSS.535.0043:
Professor Elm: [0103,0000,0000]?
Didn’t you meet my assistant?\f
He should have met you with the Egg
at Violet City’s Poké Mart.
HGSS.535.0044:
Professor Elm: Hi, [0103,0000,0000]!
How are you?\f
How is the Egg doing?
Are you taking it everywhere you go?\f
Time and care will make it hatch
and give you a healthy\r
Pokémon eventually!
HGSS.535.0045:
Professor Elm: Hi, [0103,0000,0000]!
How are you?\f
How is the Egg doing?
Are you taking it everywhere you go?\f
Time and care will make it hatch
and give you a healthy\r
Pokémon eventually!
HGSS.535.0047:
Hmm...
As far as I know, there is not a\r
Pokémon like this in Johto...\f
Just like Mr. Pokémon was saying
over the phone...\f
The legendary Pokémon could be...
Oh, never mind.\f
Anyway, I’m sure things will be
happening around you, [0103,0000,0000]!\f
You are making me all excited!
I’ll give you a present for that.\r
Please take it.\f
HGSS.535.0048:
Hmm...
As far as I know, there is not a\r
Pokémon like this in Johto...\f
Just like Mr. Pokémon was saying
over the phone...\f
The legendary Pokémon could be...
Oh, never mind.\f
Anyway, I’m sure things will be
happening around you, [0103,0000,0000]!\f
You are making me all excited!
I’ll give you a present for that.\r
Please take it.\f
HGSS.535.0049:
Professor Elm: That’s an Everstone.\f
A Pokémon changes its shape as
it evolves.\f
But if it’s holding an Everstone,
you can prevent it from evolving.\f
If you like the way a Pokémon is now,
have it hold an Everstone!\f
HGSS.535.0050:
Professor Elm: [0103,0000,0000], good luck
with your journey!\f
Oh, one more thing...
Don’t forget about my research!
HGSS.535.0051:
Professor Elm: [0103,0000,0000], good luck
with your journey!\f
Oh, one more thing...
Don’t forget about my research!
HGSS.535.0053:
Professor Elm: [0103,0000,0000]?
I thought the Egg hatched.\r
Where is the Pokémon?\f
HGSS.535.0054:
Professor Elm: [0103,0000,0000]?
I thought the Egg hatched.\r
Where is the Pokémon?\f
HGSS.535.0055:
Sigh... 
That stolen Pokémon.\f
I wonder how it’s doing.
They say a Pokémon raised by a bad\r
person turns bad itself.
HGSS.535.0056:
[0103,0000,0000]!
Guess what!\f
The person who took the Professor’s
Pokémon has...come back to return it!\f
That’s the last thing I expected!
Guess what Professor Elm said to him.\f
...
“It seems that your Pokémon already\r
likes you so much.\f
For a Pokémon, the best happiness is
to be with someone it loves.\r
I think it should stay with you.”\f
...
Isn’t it moving? It made me cry!\f
HGSS.535.0057:
The one who took it...
I mean the red-haired boy\r
came up with the Pokémon.\f
But I saw his face as he passed
me here. He looked so happy!
HGSS.535.0058:
Lyra: [0103,0000,0000]!
Did you already collect eight Badges?\r
That’s so cool!\f
The professor is waiting
for you.\f
HGSS.535.0059:
Ethan: [0103,0000,0000]!
Did you already collect eight Badges?\r
That’s so cool!\f
The professor is waiting
for you.\f
HGSS.535.0060:
Professor Elm: Hi, [0103,0000,0000]!
You never cease to amaze me!\f
Thanks to you, my research is
going great!\f
Take this as a token of my
appreciation.\f
HGSS.535.0061:
Professor Elm: Hi, [0103,0000,0000]!
You never cease to amaze me!\f
Thanks to you, my research is
going great!\f
Take this as a token of my
appreciation.\f
HGSS.535.0062:
The Master Ball is the best!\f
It’s the ultimate Poké Ball! It’ll catch
any Pokémon without fail.\f
It’s given only to noted
Pokémon researchers.\f
I think you can make much better
use of it than I can, [0103,0000,0000]!\f
HGSS.535.0063:
The Master Ball is the best!\f
It’s the ultimate Poké Ball! It’ll catch
any Pokémon without fail.\f
It’s given only to noted
Pokémon researchers.\f
I think you can make much better
use of it than I can, [0103,0000,0000]!\f
HGSS.535.0064:
By the way...\f
We just had a group of beautiful
Kimono Girls looking for you.\f
HGSS.535.0065:
By the way...\f
We just had a group of beautiful
Kimono Girls looking for you.\f
HGSS.535.0066:
The Kimono Girls told me they are
waiting for you at the Ecruteak\r
Dance Theater.\f
I know you’ve gone through many things
since that Egg got you involved in\r
all this...\f
I hope you’ll carry through it.\f
HGSS.535.0067:
Lyra: [0103,0000,0000], people are talking
about you!\f
I heard you helped Kimono Girls?\f
You’ve been helping all these people!
You make me proud to be your friend.\f
HGSS.535.0068:
Ethan: [0103,0000,0000], people are talking
about you!\f
I heard you helped Kimono Girls?\f
You’ve been helping all these people!
You make me proud to be your friend.\f
HGSS.535.0069:
Professor Elm: The Kimono Girls are
waiting for you at the\r
Ecruteak Dance Theater.
HGSS.535.0070:
Professor Elm: Hahaha... Good job!\f
That Egg that appeared to be rare has
brought you so much trouble, I guess.\f
The Kimono Girls said something
about me?\r
I don’t have anything to do with it.\f
You made up your mind yourself
and went through with your decision.\f
Having achieved such a thing,
you should be able to take on\r
the Pokémon League now!\f
You should head for the
Indigo Plateau!\f
Do you know how to get there?
Follow Route 27 to reach Route 26.\r
Once you get there, go straight north!
HGSS.535.0071:
Professor Elm: [0103,0000,0000]!
There you are!\f
I called because I have something
for you.\f
See? It’s an S.S. Ticket.
Now you can catch Pokémon in Kanto.\f
HGSS.535.0072:
Professor Elm: [0103,0000,0000]!
There you are!\f
I called because I have something
for you.\f
See? It’s an S.S. Ticket.
Now you can catch Pokémon in Kanto.\f
HGSS.535.0073:
Professor Elm: The Ticket will let you
take the Fast Ship that departs\r
from Olivine City.\f
But you knew that already,
[0103,0000,0000].\f
After all, you’ve adventured all over
with your Pokémon.\f
Give my regards to Professor Oak
in Kanto!
HGSS.535.0074:
Professor Elm: The Ticket will let you
take the Fast Ship that departs\r
from Olivine City.\f
But you knew that already,
[0103,0000,0000].\f
After all, you’ve adventured all over
with your Pokémon.\f
Give my regards to Professor Oak
in Kanto!
HGSS.535.0075:
Professor Elm: That is quite a
rare PICHU!\r
Can I take a look at it closely?\f
HGSS.535.0076:
Hmm...
One of the ears is spiky...\r
That’s strange.\r
There seems to be something more to it.\f
It really is a rare sight.\f
HGSS.535.0077:
You met it at the Ilex Forest?\f
A mysterious Pokémon called CELEBI
has been sighted there, or so I heard.\f
HGSS.535.0079:
Professor Oak once wrote about
CELEBI and [FF00,0001]Time Travel[FF00,0000] in a research\r
paper he presented at a conference!\f
HGSS.535.0080:
Professor Elm: CELEBI can use its
mystic power called [FF00,0001]Time Travel[FF00,0000]...to\r
travel to the past and future.\f
HGSS.535.0081:
If this PICHU has traveled through
time, perhaps you should take\r
extra care of it, [0103,0000,0000].\f
It seems that this PICHU has been
affected by traveling so far through\r
time with CELEBI.\f
I’ll inform the Pokémon Center of it.\f
The lady at the reception should be
able to tell you if anything may affect\r
that PICHU.
HGSS.535.0082:
If this PICHU has traveled through
time, perhaps you should take\r
extra care of it, [0103,0000,0000].\f
It seems that this PICHU has been
affected by traveling so far through\r
time with CELEBI.\f
I’ll inform the Pokémon Center of it.\f
The lady at the reception should be
able to tell you if anything may affect\r
that PICHU.
HGSS.535.0083:
Professor Elm: This PICHU doesn’t
seem like a regular PICHU.\r
I’ll find out more about it.
HGSS.535.0086:
Oh, wow, your Spiky-eared PICHU seems
to like you a lot already, [0103,0000,0000].\f
HGSS.535.0087:
Oh, wow, your Spiky-eared PICHU seems
to like you a lot already, [0103,0000,0000].\f
HGSS.535.0088:
Something’s funny...
I would expect it to evolve into\r
PIKACHU since it likes its Trainer\r
this much...\f
HGSS.535.0089:
Let me see...\f
Hmm...\f
Could it be...\f
Just as I thought!\f
HGSS.535.0090:
It seems that this PICHU will never
evolve. It’s so strange!\f
Its structure and the traveling
through time must have affected\r
its DNA.\f
I’ve never heard of a Pokémon that
doesn’t evolve when it’s\r
supposed to...!
HGSS.535.0091:
Professor Elm: Your Spiky-eared PICHU
looks just fine!\f
I’ve never heard of a Pokémon that
doesn’t evolve when it’s\r
supposed to.\r
Please take good care of it.
HGSS.535.0092:
Would you like to heal
your Pokémon? [0200,0000]
HGSS.535.0093:
[0103,0000,0000] opened a book.\f
Travel Tip 1: Touch the A Button
icon on the Touch Screen.\f
You can check things, talk to people,
and so on.
HGSS.535.0094:
[0103,0000,0000] opened a book.\f
Travel Tip 2: The Trainer Card is the
identification card for you as a Trainer\r
to travel with your Pokémon.\f
Record your adventure with SAVE!
HGSS.535.0095:
[0103,0000,0000] opened a book.\f
Travel Tip 3: Items in your Bag are
sorted by their categories.
HGSS.535.0096:
[0103,0000,0000] opened a book.\f
Travel Tip 4: The Pokégear is a
useful tool.\f
You can make a phone call,
listen to the radio, check the map,\r
and so on.
HGSS.535.0097:
You found a memo...
If a Pokémon is trying to evolve,\r
you can stop it.\f
Press the B Button during evolution.
HGSS.535.0098:
Professor Elm: Hi, [0103,0000,0000]!
How are you?\f
I’m sure you can be the next
Champion having taken care of\r
that Egg!
HGSS.535.0099:
Professor Elm: Hi, [0103,0000,0000]!
How are you?\f
I’m sure you can be the next
Champion having taken care of\r
that Egg!
HGSS.535.0100:
I’d love to take a look at the
Pokémon that hatched from\r
that Egg, [0103,0000,0000].
HGSS.535.0101:
I’d love to take a look at the
Pokémon that hatched from\r
that Egg, [0103,0000,0000].
HGSS.535.0102:
Professor Elm: [0103,0000,0000]!
I’m truly surprised!\f
I can’t believe that such a great
Trainer has been so close by\r
all this time!\f
[0103,0000,0000], you have been helping
me understand what it means to\r
walk with Pokémon.\f
It is that...\r
there is no end to the relationship\r
between people and Pokémon!\f
Let me thank you once again for
your support!
